title: C2PA Manifest Store
description: JSON schema for a C2PA Manifest Store as defined in C2PA Technical Specification v2.4. The manifest store is the top-level container for all provenance information associated with an asset.

active_manifest.description: The label (URN) of the active manifest — the most recent manifest whose content bindings cover the current asset bytes. Format: 'urn:c2pa:<uuid>:<name>'.

manifests.description: A map of manifest label → Manifest object. Keys are URN strings of the form 'urn:c2pa:<uuid>:<name>'.

validation_status.description: Flat list of top-level validation status entries (legacy v1/v2 format). Present when validation issues exist. Superseded by validation_results in v2.1+.

validation_results.description: Structured validation results map (v2.1+). Contains per-manifest success/informational/failure codes.

validation_state.description: Overall validation state of the manifest store.

Manifest.description: A C2PA Manifest: the complete provenance record for one version of an asset, comprising claim metadata, assertions, ingredient references, and a cryptographic signature.

label.description: The unique JUMBF label identifying this manifest within the store. Same as the key in the manifests map.

instance_id.description: XMP instance ID uniquely identifying this specific version of the asset. Format: 'xmp:iid:<uuid>'.

title.description: Human-readable name for the asset, typically the filename.

format.description: IANA media type of the asset (e.g. 'image/jpeg', 'video/mp4'). Present in v1 claims only; removed in claim.v2.

claim_version.description: Version of the claim structure used. 1 = c2pa.claim (legacy), 2 = c2pa.claim.v2 (current).

claim_generator.description: Free-text string identifying the software that created the claim. Present in claim v1 only; replaced by claim_generator_info in claim.v2.

claim_generator_info.description: Structured list of software/hardware agents that created this claim (claim.v2+). Replaces the free-text claim_generator.

thumbnail.description: Reference to a thumbnail image representing the visual content of this asset at the time of signing.

ingredients.description: List of ingredient assertions — references to source assets used to produce this asset.

assertions.description: All assertions included in this manifest, each identified by label.

signature_info.description: Information about the cryptographic signature on this manifest.

redacted_assertions.description: List of JUMBF URIs referencing assertions that have been redacted from this manifest.

ClaimGeneratorInfo.description: Describes a software or hardware agent that participated in creating the claim. Introduced in claim.v2 (C2PA 2.0). Additional vendor-specific fields may be present as top-level keys.

name.description: Human-readable name of the tool or application.

icon.description: Reference to an icon for the generator — either a hashed JUMBF URI or an external URL.

operating_system.description: Operating system the generator ran on. Also accepted as 'schema.org.SoftwareApplication.operatingSystem'.

SignatureInfo.description: Human-readable summary of the cryptographic signature. Not a security-critical structure — use the raw COSE signature for verification.

issuer.description: Human-readable issuing authority from the signing certificate.

common_name.description: Common name (CN) from the signing certificate.

cert_serial_number.description: Serial number of the signing certificate as a decimal string.

time.description: RFC 3339 timestamp of when the signature was created (from the embedded timestamp or signing time).

revocation_status.description: OCSP revocation status of the signing certificate.

ResourceRef.description: A reference to a binary resource (thumbnail, embedded data, etc.) stored within the manifest's JUMBF resource store.

format.description: IANA media type of the resource (e.g. 'image/jpeg', 'image/png').

identifier.description: URI pointing to the resource. May be a relative JUMBF URI ('self#jumbf=...'), a file path, or an absolute URL.

alg.description: Hash algorithm used to hash this resource (if applicable).

hash.description: Base64-encoded hash of the resource bytes.

Ingredient.description: Describes a source asset used to produce the current asset. Stored as a 'c2pa.ingredient', 'c2pa.ingredient.v2', or 'c2pa.ingredient.v3' assertion.

title.description: Human-readable name of the ingredient asset, typically its filename.

format.description: IANA media type of the ingredient asset.

instance_id.description: XMP instance ID of the ingredient asset. Format: 'xmp.iid:<uuid>'.

document_id.description: XMP document ID ('xmpMM:DocumentID') of the ingredient.

provenance.description: URI from 'dcterms:provenance' XMP field — a reference to the ingredient's origin.

hash.description: Optional hash of the ingredient asset bytes for deduplication.

relationship.description: Describes how this ingredient relates to the current asset.

thumbnail.description: Reference to a thumbnail of the ingredient asset.

active_manifest.description: Label of the active manifest in the ingredient's own manifest store, if the ingredient is a C2PA asset.

validation_status.description: Validation status codes for this ingredient (v1/v2 format).

validation_results.description: Structured validation results for this ingredient's manifest store (v3 / C2PA 2.1+).

data.description: Reference to the actual binary data of the ingredient (v2+).

description.description: Additional human-readable description of the ingredient.

informational_URI.description: URI to an informational page about the ingredient or its data.

data_types.description: Content-type classification of the ingredient data (v2+).

label.description: The assertion label used for this ingredient (e.g. 'c2pa.ingredient.v3', 'c2pa.ingredient.v3__1').

AssertionEntry.description: A single assertion entry as it appears in the manifest's assertions array.

label.description: Namespaced assertion label (e.g. 'c2pa.actions.v2', 'c2pa.metadata', 'stds.exif'). Multiple instances use suffix '__1', '__2', etc.

data.description: The assertion payload. Structure varies by label — see assertion definitions below.

instance.description: 0-based instance index when multiple assertions share the same label.

ActionsAssertion.description: Payload for 'c2pa.actions' (v1) and 'c2pa.actions.v2' assertions. Records the editing history of the asset.

actions.description: Ordered list of actions performed on the asset.

softwareAgents.description: Shared list of software agents; individual actions reference these by index. (v2+)

allActionsIncluded.description: If true, declares that no actions occurred that are not represented in this assertion. (v2+)

templates.description: Reusable action templates referenced by actions in this assertion. (v2+)

Action.description: A single editing action performed on the asset.

action.description: Action identifier. Standard values are defined in the c2pa namespace.

when.description: RFC 3339 timestamp of when this action occurred.

softwareAgent.description: The software agent that performed this action (inline or index reference).

softwareAgentIndex.description: 0-based index into the parent assertion's softwareAgents array. (v2+)

changed.description: Semicolon-delimited list of asset parts changed by this action.

changes.description: Regions of interest in the asset that were changed.

actors.description: Humans who performed this action (when applicable).

digitalSourceType.description: IPTC or C2PA digital source type URI describing the nature of the content (e.g. 'http://cv.iptc.org/newscodes/digitalsourcetype/trainedAlgorithmicMedia').

reason.description: Required when action is 'c2pa.redacted'. Explains why the assertion was redacted.

description.description: Human-readable description of this specific action.

ActionParameters.description: Action-specific parameters. Fields present depend on the action type.

ingredient.description: Hashed URI to the ingredient this action operated on (v1 actions).

ingredients.description: Hashed URIs to ingredient assertion(s) this action operated on (v2+ actions).

redacted.description: JUMBF URI to the assertion being redacted. Required when action is 'c2pa.redacted'.

name.description: Name of the operation performed (e.g. 'brightnesscontrast' for c2pa.color_adjustments).

Actor.description: Identifies a human actor who participated in an action.

identifier.description: An identifier for the human actor. Used when the reviewAction type is 'humanEntry.identified'.

credentials.description: References to W3C Verifiable Credentials for this actor.

MetadataAssertion.description: Payload for 'c2pa.metadata' assertion. Contains Dublin Core, IPTC, XMP, Exif, or Schema.org metadata fields. Field names follow their respective namespace conventions.

HashedUri.description: A URI reference with an associated cryptographic hash, used to reference and verify JUMBF-embedded resources.

url.description: JUMBF URI referencing the target resource. Format: 'self#jumbf=...' for embedded resources.

hash.description: Base64-encoded hash of the referenced resource.

alg.description: Hash algorithm used. If absent, the claim's default algorithm applies.

HashedExternalUri.description: A hash-verified reference to an external (HTTP/HTTPS) resource.

url.description: Absolute HTTP/HTTPS URL of the external resource.

hash.description: Base64-encoded hash of the external resource.

dc:format.description: IANA media type of the external resource.

size.description: Size of the external resource in bytes.

AssetType.description: Content-type classification providing more detail than MIME type alone.

type.description: A URN or other identifier naming the content type (e.g. a schema.org type or C2PA-defined type).

version.description: Optional version string for the content type.

AssertionMetadata.description: Optional metadata attached to an assertion, describing how it was reviewed or generated.

reviewRatings.description: List of human or automated review ratings for this assertion.

reference.description: Optional reference to an external resource supporting this assertion.

ValidationStatus.description: A single validation status entry reporting success, informational, or failure information about part of the manifest.

code.$comment: See ValidationStatusCodes definition for all defined values.

url.description: JUMBF URI pointing to the manifest part this status applies to.

ValidationResults.description: Structured validation results for a manifest store (C2PA 2.1+). Replaces the flat validation_status array.

activeManifest.description: Validation results for the active manifest's signature, timestamps, and assertion hashes.

ingredientDeltas.description: Per-ingredient validation deltas — changes from the ingredient's own validation results.

StatusCodes.description: Categorized validation status codes for one manifest.

failure.description: Checks that failed (e.g. untrusted signing certificate).

IngredientDelta.description: Validation delta for a single ingredient — differences between the ingredient's stored validation results and those computed at validation time.

ingredientAssertionURI.description: Absolute JUMBF URI referencing the ingredient assertion this delta applies to.

validationDeltas.description: The success/informational/failure deltas for this ingredient.

ValidationStatusCodes.description: All defined C2PA validation status codes with their severity levels.

claimSignature.insideValidity.description: Signing time is within the certificate validity period.

signingCredential.trusted.description: Signing certificate chains to a trusted root in the C2PA Trust List.

signingCredential.ocsp.notRevoked.description: OCSP check confirms the signing certificate is not revoked.

timeStamp.trusted.description: Timestamp authority certificate chains to a trusted TSA root.

assertion.hashedURI.match.description: Hashed URI in the claim matches the referenced assertion content.

assertion.dataHash.match.description: Data hash assertion matches the asset bytes.

assertion.bmffHash.match.description: BMFF hash assertion matches the BMFF asset structure.

assertion.boxesHash.match.description: Box hash assertion matches the asset's box structure.

assertion.collectionHash.match.description: Collection hash assertion matches the asset collection.

assertion.accessible.description: All claim assertions are accessible and readable.

ingredient.manifest.validated.description: Ingredient's embedded manifest was validated successfully.

timeOfSigning.insideValidity.description: Claimed signing time is within certificate validity.

signingCredential.ocsp.skipped.description: OCSP check was skipped (offline or policy).

signingCredential.ocsp.inaccessible.description: OCSP responder was unreachable at validation time.

timeStamp.untrusted.description: Timestamp TSA certificate not in Trust List, but timestamp itself is structurally valid.

timeStamp.mismatch.description: Timestamp time does not match the claimed signing time.

timeStamp.outsideValidity.description: Timestamp is outside the TSA certificate validity period.

timeStamp.malformed.description: Timestamp structure is malformed but non-fatal.

ingredient.unknownProvenance.description: Ingredient has no embedded manifest; provenance cannot be verified.

manifest.unknownProvenance.description: Manifest references an ingredient without provenance information.

manifest.unreferenced.description: Manifest in the store is not referenced via any ingredient assertion.

algorithm.deprecated.description: A deprecated hash or signing algorithm is in use.

assertion.dataHash.additionalExclusionsP.description: Data hash assertion contains additional exclusion ranges not in the claim.

claimSignature.missing.description: No claim signature found in the manifest.

claimSignature.mismatch.description: Claim signature does not match the claim content.

signingCredential.untrusted.description: Signing certificate does not chain to a trusted root.

claim.malformed.description: Claim structure is malformed or invalid.

claim.missing.description: No claim found in the manifest.

claim.multiple.description: Multiple claims found; only one is permitted.

claim.required.missing.description: A required claim field is absent.

claim.hardBindings.missing.description: No hard binding assertions present in the claim.

assertion.multipleHardBindings.description: Multiple hard binding assertions found; only one is permitted.

ingredient.hashedURI.mismatch.description: Hashed URI in an ingredient assertion does not match.
